title: The Dancers
writer: Edmund Goulding, Viola Tree, Gerald du Maurier
actors: George O'Brien, Alma Rubens, Madge Bellamy
plot: Young Tony, unable to make a living in crowded and fast-paced London, goes to South America in search of his fortune. He soon becomes the owner of a saloon and dance hall. One of the dancers in his place, Maxine, falls in love wit...
